samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit adder with bit-level adders in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
    <task>
    <description>Implement a 4-bit adder.</description>
    <input id="a" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit input operand A.</input>
    <input id="b" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit input operand B.</input>
    <input id="cin">Carry-in input.</input>
    <output id="sum" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit sum output.</output>
    <output id="cout">Carry-out output.</output>
    <implementation>
    <assign id="sum">a ^ b ^ cin</assign>
    <assign id="cout">((a & b) | (b & cin) | (cin & a))</assign>
    </implementation>
    </task>
    <assign id="product[0]">A[0] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[1]">A[1] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[2]">A[2] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[3]">A[3] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[4]">A[4] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[5]">A[5] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[6]">A[6] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[7]">A[7] & B[0]</assign>
    <assign id="product[8]">A[0] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[9]">A[1] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[10]">A[2] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[11]">A[3] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[12]">A[4] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[13]">A[5] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[14]">A[6] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[15]">A[7] & B[1]</assign>
    <assign id="product[8]">product[8] | (A[0] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[9]">product[9] | (A[1] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[10]">product[10] | (A[2] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[11]">product[11] | (A[3] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[12]">product[12] | (A[4] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[13]">product[13] | (A[5] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[14]">product[14] | (A[6] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[15]">product[15] | (A[7] & B[2])</assign>
    <assign id="product[8]">product[8] | (product[8] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[9]">product[9] | (product[9] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[10]">product[10] | (product[10] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[11]">product[11] | (product[11] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[12]">product[12] | (product[12] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[13]">product[13] | (product[13] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[14]">product[14] | (product[14] << 1)</assign>
    <assign id="product[15]">product[15] | (product[15] << 1)</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
